_meta.title: Content family BUILD (M1 component wave -> catalog/security wave -> M2 exemplar wave) — the execution plan the content-family SPEC/LLD are authored against
_meta.author: system-planner
_meta.grounding: PRD content-family.prd.md (PRD-G1..G5) · ADR-0113 (ACCEPTED 2026-07-09; forks F1-F4 as recommended) · ADR-0114 (ACCEPTED 2026-07-09; forks F1-F3 as recommended) · the intake decomp content-family-intake.decomp.json (M0 records only — this manifest adds the build plane it deliberately did not cover) · the chart-family-build.decomp.json wave shape (the ratified fan-out pattern) · fleet gates verified against the tree: site-coverage.test.ts PAGES_BY_TIER (display->{doc}, pattern->{doc,demo}) + the hard-coded per-tier membership lists, catalog/default/index.test.ts (SPEC-N2 fleet-derived gate), tools/agent/feed-catalog.ts + feed-catalog.test.ts (the TOTAL partition gate, currently 23 IN / 13 OUT over 36 types), conformance.ts (CATALOG failures at <id>.<prop>), text.ts (the ADR-0078 cl.4 stamp/heal machinery the href extension rides).
_meta.note: Both planes derived independently: OUTSIDE-IN from the wave/slice structure the fleet's build discipline imposes (one writer per control folder in parallel -> ONE serial integration slice for every shared/barrel edit -> site pages -> same-wave catalog+security+feed edits -> exemplar), sliced for fan-out. INSIDE-OUT from what the family must DO (render code verbatim and self-scrolled, hold the highlighting/copy fences, stamp a real anchor, deny every unsafe scheme identically across all four write paths, degrade denied links to plain text for AT, keep the host attribute inert, fold content behind native details with two-way announced open, keep children=body under streaming/clobber, pay the feed partition, stay catalog-reachable same wave) — enumerated from ADR-0113 cl.1-7 + ADR-0114 cl.1-6 + the standing laws (ADR-0101, ADR-0102, ADR-0057, geometry.md, test-the-whole-shape), not read off the node tree.

nodes.label: text hyperlink extension slice (controls/text/: href.ts pure gate + text.ts as='a'/href + text.css link leg + text.md + text tests + the security negative-control file)
nodes.accept: text-href-security.test.ts exists and passes: the 4-write-path denial matrix (attribute / property / factory applyProp / bound-path update) each leaves the stamped <a> with NO href attribute and :any-link false, PLUS the allowed-twin (https via the same 4 paths lands href byte-identical + rel='noopener noreferrer' + target='_blank'); text.test.ts covers href reflection both ways + @ts-expect-error + as accepts 'a'; text.browser.test.ts gains the link-treatment/zero-geometry-delta/clobber-restamp-keeps-gated-href legs; npm test green on the folder

nodes.label: ui-code control folder (controls/code/: code.ts + code.css + code.md + jsdom & browser tests)
nodes.accept: file-set gate passes for controls/code/; code.ts contains NO MutationObserver and no stamp machinery (grep-able absence, the zero-machinery ruling); jsdom asserts internals.role='code', language reflects and has zero rendering effect; browser legs (Chromium+WebKit) assert a multi-line snippet renders un-wrapped with the host scrolling inside its own box in a narrow flex container (whole-shape: scrollWidth > clientWidth with host box intact)

nodes.label: ui-disclosure control folder (controls/disclosure/: disclosure.ts + disclosure.css + disclosure.md + jsdom & browser tests)
nodes.accept: file-set gate passes for controls/disclosure/; jsdom asserts the details/summary part anatomy, summary-prop textContent write, children=body adoption after a streamed append, and open prop<->details.open convergence with exactly one host toggle per actual transition; browser legs (both engines) assert user-click settles prop+attribute+toggle, the native marker is hidden with the chevron affordance present, and the Chromium find-in-page leg reveals folded content (WebKit structural probe per the instrument-bridge precedent)

nodes.label: serial integration slice (controls/index.ts barrel · descriptor/component-styles.css imports · site-coverage per-tier membership edits [display += code, pattern += disclosure] · components package.json exports entries · manual size report)
nodes.accept: npm run check && npm test green repo-wide (family-coherence C1/C3 prove barrel export + styles import; site-coverage tier lists updated and the gate BITES when either new entry is reverted — negative control); npm run size run by hand and reported, with the ADR-0107-Amendment-style family-budget re-base recorded as its own note if exceeded

nodes.label: site pages (site/code-doc.html · site/disclosure-doc.html + site/disclosure-demo.html · toc/nav rows)
nodes.accept: site-coverage per-tier page gate green (code tier=display -> {doc}; disclosure tier=pattern -> {doc,demo}); site toc/nav drift gates green; all three pages render the live controls in the built site; npm run check (incl. check:site) green

nodes.label: M1 catalog + security wave (same wave as the descriptors — SPEC-N2)
default-catalog rows + factories (catalog.json Code/Disclosure rows + Text.href cell · factories.ts codeFactory/disclosureFactory/textFactory href arm · gate tests)
nodes.accept: catalog.json declares Code (code bindable->textContent, language non-bindable) and Disclosure (summary bindable, open bindable + value:{prop:'open',event:'toggle'}, children ChildList) and the Text row gains href (string, bindable); factories.test.ts asserts codeFactory's code->textContent arm, the disclosure two-way mark, and the href->as='a'+href fan-out converging order-independently against a variant sibling; catalog/default/index.test.ts fleet-derived gate green with allowlist residue none; prompt-drift.test.ts green over the widened catalog

nodes.label: validator first-line leg (PropDef format:'safe-href' on Text.href · conformance.ts static-scheme arm importing the components-owned scheme set · conformance tests)
nodes.accept: a static Text.href literal with a disallowed absolute scheme fails validateA2ui with CATALOG at <id>.href and self-corrects in a produce-loop leg; a RELATIVE static literal passes; a BOUND disallowed href passes the static validator and is still rendered non-navigable by the component gate (the defense-in-depth pair, asserted as two separate tests); the scheme SET is imported from the components-owned module, never re-spelled

nodes.label: feed-partition dispositions (feed-catalog.ts: Code -> FEED_SURFACE_TYPES, Disclosure -> FEED_EXCLUDED with the Tabs hides-the-ask reason)
nodes.accept: feed-catalog.test.ts partition gate green over the 38-type catalog (24 IN / 14 OUT); the Disclosure exclusion entry carries the recorded reason; reverting either disposition turns the gate red (the gate's own negative control still bites)

nodes.label: catalog SPEC repair (a2ui-catalog.spec.md §5.2: Code + Disclosure rows, the Text row href cell, the Notes when-to-use guidance)
nodes.accept: a2ui-catalog.spec.md §5.2 carries both new rows + the widened Text row + the Text-for-prose/Code-for-verbatim/Disclosure-for-progressive-detail/links-for-sources guidance prose in the same change as the rows; harness_checks.py spec on the catalog SPEC still exits 0

nodes.label: report exemplar seed (Card + Text + Code + a source link + a Disclosure-folded detail; joins allSeeds)
nodes.accept: the seed exists in the examples module and allSeeds; validates 0 CATALOG errors through validateA2ui; renders in the examples/gallery surface (browser-verified); it composes all three new capabilities (a Code block, a Text href source link, a Disclosure fold)

nodes.label: corpus + derived-prompt re-validation over the widened catalog
nodes.accept: the corpus admission gate and the derived-prompt/coverage gates re-run green with Code/Disclosure/Text.href in the catalog (the ADR-0087 consequence pattern); any shard/prompt drift is repaired in the same change

actions.label: render code verbatim — whitespace preserved, mono at body metrics, horizontal overflow scrolled inside the component's own box with zero consumer CSS
carry language as inert metadata and hold the highlighting + copy fences (zero machinery: no observer, no stamp, no tokenizer)
announce code honestly to AT (role=code via internals) and keep scrolled content keyboard-reachable where the platform provides it
stamp a real anchor (as='a' + href) with native link semantics and zero geometry delta, surviving the bound-text clobber with the gated href intact
deny every unsafe scheme identically across attribute, property, factory, and bound writes — fail-closed at the one component gate, never rewriting the value
degrade a denied link to plain text for AT (no href, no link role, no tab stop) and keep the host's reflected href attribute inert by construction
apply the fixed rel/target policy and the underline+ink link treatment (never hue-only)
catch static disallowed hrefs at the validator first line (CATALOG at the prop path) while bound values fall to the component gate — defense in depth, both lines proven separately
fold long content behind a native summary/details with two-way open under the always-announce law (user click, model write, find-in-page all settle the prop and fire toggle exactly once)
keep the children=body invariant under parser streaming and factory/renderer child writes
replace the native marker with the fleet chevron affordance, keep fold animation out of v1, and survive forced-colors and density
join the fleet lifecycle: barrel export, styles import, descriptor trip-wires, exports map, size budget
document the new controls under the site per-tier page law
make Code, Disclosure, and Text.href catalog-reachable and validator-clean the same wave the descriptors land (SPEC-N2), with the href fan-out converging order-independently
pay the ADR-0097 feed partition: Code IN, Disclosure OUT with its reason, Text.href riding Text's IN membership consciously
keep the owning catalog SPEC true — §5.2 rows + the when-to-use guidance in the same change
teach the report idiom by exemplar (code + source link + folded detail beat plain Text)
re-validate the teaching surfaces (corpus, derived prompt) over the widened catalog

edges.why: the serial integration slice edits shared barrel/styles/coverage files to carry what the text folder ships — the folder lands first (one-writer-per-file fan-out law)
same shared-file dependency for the code folder
same shared-file dependency for the disclosure folder — all three folders land before the ONE serial writer touches controls/index.ts, component-styles.css, and the site-coverage tier lists
the doc/demo pages mount the barrel-exported, style-imported controls; before the integration slice the site build cannot resolve them
the SPEC-N2 fleet-derived gate walks shipped, integrated descriptors (tag -> PascalCase) — the catalog rows are validated against descriptors that exist, in the same wave (ADR-0113 cl.5)
the conformance arm imports the scheme SET from the components-owned href module (one policy constant, never re-spelled) — the module must exist first
the conformance arm keys off the Text.href row's format marker — the widened row must be declared before the validator leg can gate it
the partition gate demands a disposition for every type the catalog now declares — the feed edit dispositions the rows n2a lands, in the same wave (the gate is red between them)
the §5.2 rows record landed facts (factory binding, the two-way mark, the href cell), not intentions
the exemplar must validate 0-CATALOG against the widened catalog — the rows must be declared before the seed can pass admission
the exemplar's source link passes through the first-line validator — the leg must exist so the seed proves the whole security stack, not a bypass of it
the corpus/prompt re-validation covers the new exemplar too — it runs after the seed joins allSeeds so one pass proves the whole widened surface
